title: The Voice I Missed
content: After several months working overseas, Ethan became used to communicating through text messages. One evening, Lily surprised him with a phone call instead. Hearing her voice again felt strangely comforting. They talked about ordinary things—work, family, and weekend plans—but every laugh reminded Ethan how much he had missed moments that could never be captured in writing. When the call ended, he realized that some feelings travel much better through a familiar voice than through a screen full of carefully chosen words.
